overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a stormy riverbank in a video game, likely Red Dead Redemption 2. The player moves past a wooden cabin and continues along the muddy shore as heavy rain falls and lightning flashes across the dark sky.

events.description: heavy rain begins falling, visible as streaks across the screen
lightning flash illuminates the storm clouds in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy riverbank, passing a wooden cabin on the left side

entered.detail: rustic wooden building with sloped roof situated on the riverbank
dark reflective water surface showing storm cloud reflections
group of drooping willow trees on the opposite bank
dark grey storm clouds covering the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy riverbank with a wooden cabin visible to the left. Heavy rain begins to fall as the camera moves forward along the muddy shore. Lightning flashes in the distance, briefly illuminating the dark storm clouds overhead while the willow trees on the far bank sway in the wind.

events.description: bright lightning flash reflects off the river water surface

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbank as the rain intensifies, moving away from the cabin

entered.detail: green grass and mud mixture along the water's edge
vague outline of a building or bridge visible through the rain haze

segments.scene_description: Having passed the wooden cabin, the scene opens into a wider riverbank view. The rain intensifies as lightning flashes reflect off the dark water surface. The grassy bank continues on the left while a distant structure becomes barely visible through the storm haze ahead.

events.description: stone bridge structure becomes clearly visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a stone bridge while following the curve of the riverbank

entered.detail: stone arch bridge spanning the river in the distance
thick cluster of willow trees lining the right bank

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a stone bridge spanning the river ahead. Dense willow trees line the right bank while the grassy shore continues on the left. The storm persists with heavy rain as the camera moves closer to the bridge structure, revealing its stone arches through the downpour.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy riverbank that transitions from a secluded cabin area to the approach of a stone bridge. It begins beside a wooden cabin on a muddy shore, moving forward as heavy rain falls and lightning flashes briefly illuminate the dark clouds and swaying willow trees. As the camera passes the cabin, the view opens into a wider expanse of the riverbank where the rain intensifies and lightning reflects off the dark water's surface. The scene then shifts toward a distant structure emerging through the storm haze, with the grassy bank continuing on the left. Finally, the camera closes in on a stone bridge spanning the river, revealing its arches through the downpour while dense willow trees line the opposite bank.
